title: ADVOCACY - 211info
text: LATINO NETWORK ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trains youth and adults in civic engagement and advocacy, mobilizes community members for key meetings and testimony opportunities, and advocates at the city, county, and state level. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 283-6881 Director Ana Muñoz [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Ethnic Advocacy Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS AL KINDER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - JUNTOS APRENDEMOS EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLEGIO DE PADRES/PARENTS COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ESCALERA EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ESCALERA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRECIENDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MILPA GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PADRINOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SOÑANDO JUNTOS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UNIDOS FOR OREGON LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALING INITIATIVE LEGAL SERVICES - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL NAVIGATOR SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CONEXIONES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NINTH GRADE COUNTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - P3 COORDINATORS UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
